features: Axe Deodorant Body Spray For Men a all over body spray that combines a seductive, longer long-lasting fragrance with effective deodorant protection.
description: Product description Axe Deodorant Body Spray For Men an all-over body spray that combines a seductive, longer long-lasting fragrance with effective deodorant protection. Directions Shake the spray, hold it at arm's length and spray a thin layer under the armpits. Let it dry before putting on clothes. Repeat if necessary after physical activity.
